content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of integers and a target value TTT.

Your task is to find a pair of distinct elements in the array that sum up to the target value. Among all such valid pairs, you must identify the one that has the maximum product.


Input Format

The first line contains two space separated integers, NNN denoting the size of the array and the target TTT .
The second line contains NNN space separated integers, representing the elements of the array.


Output Format

Print the two numbers of the pair with the maximum product, separated by a space. The larger number must be printed first.
If no pair sums up to the target, print −1-1−1.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The pairs that sum to 18 are (11, 7) and (10, 8).
Product of (11, 7) is 77.
Product of (10, 8) is 80.
The maximum product is 80, so the output is 10 8.
